messages.message: Hi
Hi there! It's lovely to hear from you. I'm here to support you on your well-being journey within AURA. How can I help you today?
I'm feeling sad

Sinto muito que esteja a sentir-se triste neste momento. É um passo corajoso partilhar isso. Para o ajudar a entender melhor o que está a sentir, pode ser útil preencher o questionário PHQ-9, que está disponível na página "Inquéritos" na aplicação.
In English

I'm truly sorry to hear you're feeling sad right now. It takes courage to share that, and to help us understand it better, I recommend taking the PHQ-9 questionnaire. You can find this on the "Questionnaires" page in the app.
Can you tell me how many hours do i need to sleep

That's a great question about sleep, and it's so important for our well-being. While individual sleep needs can vary, you might find some helpful guided audio exercises and resources on the "Sleep" page within the AURA app. Exploring those can often provide insights and support for improving your sleep quality.
Hi
Hello there! It's lovely to hear from you. I'm here to support you on your mental wellness journey within AURA. How can I help you today?
I'm feeling sad

I'm sorry to hear you're feeling sad today. It takes courage to express that, and I'm here to support you.

To help understand your feelings better, I recommend taking the "PHQ-9" questionnaire. You can find it and other helpful tools in the "Questionnaires" page of the app.
Thank you
Your mental health matters. Let's continue this conversation.
Okay, what type of medication should i do
Your mental health matters. Let's continue this conversation.
Answer another thing

I'm here to support you with your mental wellness journey within AURA, but as an AI, I cannot provide medical advice, including recommendations for medication.

I understand you have another question. Please feel free to share what's on your mind, and I'll do my best to help within my capabilities.

6d62e8a4-8a76-478f-bb3f-324ff5dee2ba.title: Estou me sentindo um pouco mal...

messages.message: Estou me sentindo um pouco mal hoje

Compreendo que se esteja a sentir um pouco mal hoje. É importante reconhecer esses sentimentos.

Para te ajudar a compreender melhor o que sentes, sugiro que faças o questionário WHO-5, que está disponível na página "Inquéritos". Explorar as meditações ou exercícios de sono na app também pode ser útil para encontrar algum conforto.
Today I'm feeling anxious
I understand you're feeling anxious. Taking some deep breaths can help. What do you think is causing this anxiety?
I have a hard test tomorrow

That sounds like a lot of pressure, and it's completely understandable to feel anxious with a hard test coming up. Taking some time to manage that stress can really help.

You might find it helpful to take the GAD-7 questionnaire to better understand your anxiety, which you can find on the "Inquéritos" page. Also, visiting our "Meditations" or "Sleep" pages might offer some guided exercises to help you relax and prepare for tomorrow.
